title: Christ Arose (Low in the Grave He Lay)
author: Robert Lowry
story: Lowry, a Baptist pastor, wrote both words and music. The quiet, minor-key verses describing Christ's burial burst into the triumphant major-key chorus: 'He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!'

lines: Low in the grave He lay Jesus my Savior
Waiting the coming day\Jesus my Lord
Up from the grave He arose, With a mighty triumph o'er His He arose
Vainly they watch His bed\Jesus my Savior
Vainly they seal the dead\Jesus my Lord
He arose a Victor from the dark domain, And He lives forever with His saints to reign
Death cannot keep his prey\Jesus my Savior
He tore the bars away\Jesus my Lord
